name: NIT Rourkela Summer Internship Programme 2025
eligibility: Undergraduate and Master's Students
about: NIT Rourkela Summer Internship Programme 2025 is an opportunity offered by the National Institute of Technology (NIT), Rourkela for undergraduate and master’s students. The program aims to encourage ambitious students to pursue innovative research and development projects at the institute. The selected candidates will receive ₹7,500 per month and other benefits.
Eligible: be pursuing one of the following:
a B.E./B.Tech and appeared for at least 4th-semester examination
a B. Arch/Integrated M.Sc./Integrated M.Tech/Dual degree and has appeared for at least 6th-semester examination
an M.Sc/MA/MBA and has appeared for at least 2nd-semester examination
have a good academic record
possess the marks/grade sheet from all the previous semesters
be free for the internship tenure (16th May - 15th July 2025)
note: Fellowship or other kinds of financial assistance will not be provided.
benefits: ₹7,500 per month as approximate food and accommodation costs at NIT Rourkela hostel
Institutional medical facilities
Laboratory, library, and internet facilities
documents: Photograph of the applicant (Less than 200 KB in size)
Marksheet of previous semester (PDF, less than 3 MB in size)
Recommendation form (PDF, less than 3 MB in size)
How_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for the scholarship through the following steps:
Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below.
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details (Note: If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID).
Step 3: Navigate to the ‘How To Apply’ section and click ‘Apply to Newcastle Portal’.
Step 4: Click ‘Register as a New Applicant’ and fill in the required details, then click ‘Register’.
Step 5: Confirm the provided email address and click on the registration link to complete the profile.
Step 6: Click ‘Create Application’ and select the postgraduate option.
Step 7: Fill in the required details, upload the necessary documents and submit the application.

name: TOEFL Global Scholar Challenge 2025-26 - 2nd Edition
eligibility: Indian citizen studying in 3rd or 4th year of college.
about: The TOEFL Global Scholar Challenge 2025-26 - 2nd Edition is an online quiz competition organised by TOEFL to support Indian students aspiring to study abroad. Participants have the opportunity to win prizes worth a total of ₹1,30,000, along with TOEFL test fee coupons worth ₹500 and TOEFL official preparation resources worth ₹7,500 for free.  Here's what awaits you: Quick and easy registration for the championship. Take an online 30-minute multiple choice question (MCQ) quiz that tests your study abroad awareness, English proficiency and general knowledge related to global education. Winners will get prizes worth a total of ₹1,30,000 to support their study abroad dreams.
Eligible: Indian citizen studying in 3rd or 4th year of college
note: In addition, 25 students will get a chance to win TOEFL coupons worth ₹500 along with FREE prep resources (worth ₹7,500), scholarships, and discounts.
benefits: Total prize money worth ₹1.3 lakh
1st place winner - ₹50,000
2nd place winner - ₹25,000
3rd place winner - ₹25,000
Runners-up (3 winners) - ₹10,000 each
How_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for the scholarship through the following steps:
Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below.
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details (Note: If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID).
Step 3: Navigate to the ‘How To Apply’ section and click ‘Apply to Newcastle Portal’.
Step 4: Click ‘Register as a New Applicant’ and fill in the required details, then click ‘Register’.
Step 5: Confirm the provided email address and click on the registration link to complete the profile.

name: IndusInd Bank ‘Educate For Life’ Scholarship Program
eligibility: For students from graduation courses
about: IndusInd Bank ‘Educate For Life’ Scholarship Program is an initiative by IndusInd Bank that aims to provide scholarships to needy students and to support them in continuing their education in the form of scholarships. Under this scholarship, students from graduation courses will be provided with one-time financial assistance of up to INR 75,000 to cover their academic expenses.
Eligible: Students from general/professional graduation courses (any year) are eligible
They must have secured a minimum of 60% marks in Class 12
Open to PAN India students
Total annual family income must be less than INR 6 lakh from all sources
Children of IndusInd Bank and Buddy4Study are not eligible
note: The scholar selection process will be completed by March 12, 2025. Early eligible applications, submitted on a first-come, first-served basis, will receive additional weightage in the selection process
benefits: For Professional Graduation Courses - INR 72,000 (Fixed scholarship)
For General Graduation - INR 24,000 (Fixed scholarship)
documents: A Government-issued ID Proof (Aadhaar card/voter ID card/driving license)
Current year’s admission proof (fee receipt/institution identity card/bonafide certificate)
Family Income Proof (Salary Slips, Letter from an authorised government official, Parent’s Form 16)
How_to_apply: Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below
Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land onto the ‘Application Form Page.’
If not registered - Register at Buddy4Study with your Email/Mobile number
You will now be redirected to the ‘IndusInd Bank ‘Educate For Life’ Scholarship Program’ application form page
Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process
Fill in the required details in the online application form
Upload relevant documents
Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview.’
If all the details filled in the application are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process

name: L&T Build India Scholarship 2025
eligibility: Final-year student pursuing B.E./B.Tech. degree in Civil or Electrical Engineering at IIT Delhi,IIT Madras, IT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy
about: L&T Build India Scholarship 2025 is an opportunity offered by Larsen & Toubro (L&T), a leading Indian multinational engineering and construction company. It provides financial assistance to students pursuing a Master's degree in Construction Technology & Management (M.Tech. CT&M) at IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, NIT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy. The selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of ₹13,400 for 24 months, till the course completion.
Eligible: be a final-year student pursuing a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Civil or Electrical Engineering at IIT Delhi, IIT Madras, NIT Surathkal, and NIT Trichy
be expected to graduate in the academic year 2024 or earlier
have secured a minimum academic aggregate of 70% or a CGPA of 7.0 (out of 10)
note: After completing the application form and uploading all required documents, submit the application. The applicants will receive an email confirmation acknowledging receipt of their submission.
benefits: Selected scholars will receive a monthly stipend of ₹13,400 for the duration of the program
L&T will cover the entire tuition fee for the two-year M.Tech. CT&M program
Scholars will also get the opportunity to participate in live projects at L&T construction sites, gaining valuable practical experience
Additionally, alumni of the L&T Build India Scholarship program will guide and mentor the scholars throughout their studies
How_to_apply: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email Id.)
Step 3: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below and read the details carefully
Step 4: Read the details carefully, navigate to the 'Apply Now for Build India Scholarship 2025' at the bottom of the page, and click on it
Step 5: Fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note - If the applicant is already registered log in using valid credentials.)
Step 6: After successful registration, fill in the application form, upload the necessary documents, and submit

name: Taiwan ICDF International Higher Education Scholarship Program 2025
eligibility: Undergraduate, graduate and PhD.applicants
about: Taiwan ICDF International Higher Education Scholarship Program 2025 is an opportunity offered by the International Cooperation and Development Fund (TaiwanICDF). It provides scholarships to outstanding students for higher education in cooperation with renowned partner universities in Taiwan. The selected candidates will receive a monthly allowance of up to TWD 20,000 and other benefits.
Eligible: be a citizen of India
secure their highest-level diploma certificate before 31st July 2025
fulfil the requirements of the partner university where they have applied to study with the scholarship
fulfil the resident visa requirements set by the Bureau of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs
fulfil the requirements for an Alien Resident Certificate (ARC) set by the Ministry of the Interior, of the ROC (Taiwan) government
note: Students who previously received a MOFA Taiwan Scholarship, a MOE scholarship, or a TaiwanICDF scholarship must have graduated by 31st July 2024 to be eligible for this scholarship in 2025
Students applying for this scholarship in a row are ineligible in 2025
Students who previously had their scholarship revoked by any ROC (Taiwan) government agency or related institute or expelled from a university are ineligible
Students holding another ROC (Taiwan) government-sponsored scholarship during the TaiwanICDF scholarship are ineligible
benefits: Economy class airfare to and fro Taiwan
Residence in student dormitories
Full tuition fee waiver
Credit fee waiver
Insurance fee for the entire duration of a student’s program
The costs of textbooks purchased, subject to the approval of the director of the institute
A fixed monthly allowance to the student's local bank account for food and living costs in the following way:
Master's Program: TWD 18,000
Ph.D. Program: TWD 20,000
documents: Passport or other document showing proof of nationality
How_to_apply: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button
Step 2: Click the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details. (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID)
Step 3: Click 'TaiwanICDF Scholarship Online Application System'
Step 4: Follow the specified steps to submit the application

name: Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program 2024-25
eligibility: For class 11th and 12th students
about: The Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program 2024-25 is an initiative of Tata Capital Limited to support the higher education of students belonging to economically weaker sections of society. Under this scholarship program, students studying in Classes 11 and 12 or pursuing general graduation/diploma/polytechnic courses will be provided with a one-time scholarship of up to 80% of their course fees or an amount ranging from INR 10,000 to INR 12,000 (whichever is less) to fulfill their academic dreams
Eligible: Students studying in Class 11 or Class 12 at a recognised educational institution in India can apply
Applicants must have scored at least 60% marks in the preceding class
The annual family income of the applicants from all sources must be less than or equal to INR 2.5 lakh
Children of employees of Tata Capital & Buddy4Study are not eligible
Open to Indian nationals only
note: The scholarship is renewable annually based on performance.
Candidates are selected through a rigorous process including essays and interviews.
benefits: Up to 80% of course fees paid by the student or up to INR 10,000 (whichever is less)
documents: Income proof (Form 16A/income certificate issued by government authority/salary slips, etc.)
Proof of admission (school/college ID card/bonafide certificate, etc.)
Bank account details of the scholarship applicant (cancelled cheque/passbook copy)
Marksheets or grade cards of the preceding class
How_to_apply: Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below
Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’
If not registered, register at Buddy4Study with your email/mobile number/Gmail account
You will now be redirected to the ‘Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program for Class 11 and 12 Students 2024-25’ application form page
Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process
Fill in the required details in the online application form
Upload relevant documents
Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’
If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process

name: Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program 2024-25
eligibility: For class 11th and 12th students
about: The Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program 2024-25 is an initiative of Tata Capital Limited to support the higher education of students belonging to economically weaker sections of society. Under this scholarship program, students studying in Classes 11 and 12 or pursuing general graduation/diploma/polytechnic courses will be provided with a one-time scholarship of up to 80% of their course fees or an amount ranging from INR 10,000 to INR 12,000 (whichever is less) to fulfill their academic dreams
Eligible: Students who are currently enrolled in undergraduate degree programs such as B.Com., B.Sc., BA, etc., or diploma/polytechnic courses at recognised institutions in India can apply
Applicants must have scored at least 60% marks in the preceding class/semester/year
The annual family income of the applicants from all sources must be less than or equal to INR 2.5 lakh
Children of employees of Tata Capital & Buddy4Study are not eligible
Open to Indian nationals only
note: The scholarship is renewable annually based on performance.
Candidates are selected through a rigorous process including essays and interviews.
benefits: Up to 80% of course fees paid by students or up to INR 12,000 (whichever is less)
documents: Income proof (Form 16A/income certificate issued by government authority/salary slips, etc.)
Proof of admission (college/institution ID card/bonafide certificate, etc.)
Bank account details of the scholarship applicant (cancelled cheque/passbook copy)
Marksheets or grade cards of the preceding class
How_to_apply: Click on the ‘Apply Now’ button below
Login to Buddy4Study with your registered ID and land on the ‘Application Form Page’
If not registered, register at Buddy4Study with your email/mobile number/Gmail account
You will now be redirected to the ‘Tata Capital Pankh Scholarship Program for Class 11 and 12 Students 2024-25’ application form page
Click on the ‘Start Application’ button to begin the application process
Fill in the required details in the online application form
Upload relevant documents
Accept the ‘Terms and Conditions’ and click on ‘Preview’
If all the details filled in by the applicant are correctly showing on the preview screen, click on the ‘Submit’ button to complete the application process

name: NGSF Internship Program 2025
eligibility: Undergraduate/Postgraduate students
about: NGSF Internship Program 2025 is an internship opportunity offered by the Next Gen Scientists Foundation (NGO registered under the Trust Act of India 1882) for students pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate studies who wish to gain research experience in life sciences. The selected interns will receive a stipend of up to ₹6,000 per month and other benefits.
Eligible: be a student studying in one of the following at an Indian institution:
the second year of a 3-year undergraduate program OR
the second/third year of a 4-year undergraduate program OR
a first year of a 2-year master's program OR
the second/third/fourth year of a 5-year integrated program

Accepted to work in a lab with a professor/principal investigator who has at least three years of faculty experience and three publications as the corresponding author in peer-reviewed journals at any Indian institute outside their own
be interested in undertaking a life science-associated internship for a period of two (minimum of 56 days) or three (minimum of 84 days) months
note: Students receiving financial assistance from the principal investigator and/or any other agencies (KVPY, INSA, JNCASR, IIT, IISER) are eligible to apply. However, they cannot get additional support from the program.
benefits: The selected interns will receive a stipend amount of ₹6,000 per month for on-site internships and ₹3,000 for remote internships for a period of up to 3 months upon satisfying the following requirements:

To receive the first month’s stipend, applicants have to get the internship joining letter filled out by the hosting Principal Investigator (PI) and send the scanned version to the Next Gen Scientists Foundation (NGSF).

To receive the second month’s stipend, interns are required to send an article for the NGS blog under the specified guidelines before the first week of the second month of the Internship. Also, the interns are required to fill out the Internship continuation letter.
Interns are required to submit the following:
work progress report for the Internship period within the last week of the second/third month
feedback form at the end of the internship
research work at the end of the internship period in the NGS Interns webinar to receive an internship completion certificate and travel reimbursements
Additionally, on-site interns will receive a reimbursement for their travel expenses, up to the amount it costs to buy a round-trip third-class air-conditioned (III AC) train ticket.
documents: Acceptance letter duly filled by the Principal Investigator (PI)
Contact details of at least one referee (Note:- A maximum of two references are allowed)
Curriculum Vitae (CV) [Maximum of 2 pages in PDF format]
How_to_apply: Step 1: Click on the 'Apply Now' button below.
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button and fill in the required registration details. (Note:- If already registered, log in using Gmail/Mobile number/Email ID).
Step 3: Click on the 'NGSF Internship Program 2025 Application' to access the application form (Google form).
Step 4: Fill in all the required details, upload the necessary documents and submit the application.

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for ST, SC and MBC Students, Odisha 2024-25
eligibility: Odisha students studying in class 9th or 10th
about: Pre-Matric Scholarship for ST, SC and MBC Students, Odisha 2024-25 is an opportunity provided by the ST&SC and MBC Welfare Department of the Government of Odisha to students studying in class 9 or 10. The aim of this scholarship is to promote literacy and uninterrupted education at the pre-matric level and reduce the number of dropouts. Selected candidates will receive annual scholarships according to course duration.
Eligible: be a domicile of Odisha
belong to Scheduled Caste (SC), Scheduled Tribe (ST), or Most Backward Classes (MBC*)
be pursuing studies in class 9 or 10
have a collective family income not exceeding ₹2,50,000 per annum
note: Most Backward Classes (MBC) include Other Backward Classes (OBC), Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC), and Economically Backward Classes (EBC) categories.
benefits: Selected candidates will receive annual scholarships according to their respective courses and duration.
documents: Copy of passbook of bank account with account number and IFSC code of the bank branch
Marksheet of the last exam passed
How_to_apply: Step 1: Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard and fill in the required details to 'Register' (Note:- If already registered, log in using the registered email ID.)
Step 3: Navigate to 'Login' at the top of the page and click it, then click 'Student Login'.
Step 4: Click 'Register Here', tick the checkbox, and click 'Proceed'.
Step 5: Enter the required details to register.
Step 6: After successful registration, log in with valid credentials.
Step 7: Navigate to the 'Pre Matric' tab and click 'Apply Now'.
Step 8: Provide the necessary information, upload the necessary documents and submit the application.

name: JN Tata Endowment Loan Scholarship 2025-26
eligibility: Loan scholarship of up to 10 lakhs
about: Established in 1892 by Jamsetji Nusserwanjee Tata, the Promoter of the Tata Group, The JN Tata Endowment awards merit-based loan scholarships to students across India for higher studies overseas. Every year, 90 to 100 scholars are selected across disciplines ranging from the sciences (applied, pure, and social) to management, law and commerce and the fine arts.
Eligible: Candidates should be Indian citizens, not older than 45 years as of June 30, 2025, and graduates of a recognised Indian university having scored at least 60% marks on average in their undergraduate or postgraduate studies.
Candidates are not eligible to apply if their undergraduate degree is not from a recognised university in India.
Candidates who are admitted to the course must be recognised as a Graduate Program (postgraduate in Indian terminology).

Candidates who did not get selected in the previous year/earlier for the JN Tata Endowment loan scholarship and candidates who could not avail of the loan scholarship when they were selected are eligible to apply afresh.

Candidates who are already pursuing postgraduate studies overseas may apply either at the end of their first year of studies or at the commencement of the second year, provided there is a minimum of one full academic year (12 months) remaining to be completed at the time of the loan scholarship award, typically in July of any calendar year.
Candidates in the final year of their degree course and those awaiting results are eligible to apply.

Candidates may apply, even if they do not have the admission/offer letter from the universities to which they have applied for the academic year 2025-2026, at the time of filling out the application form.

However, they must update their application status with the Endowment once they secure admission by sending an appropriate email to jnteapplication@tatatrusts.org, quoting the reference number that appears on the top left side of the form.
JN Tata scholars who have fully repaid their existing loan scholarship amount are eligible to apply.

Candidates going overseas for seminars, conferences, training, workshops, paper presentations, undergraduate studies, and any postgraduate degree/diploma/certificates through Distance learning or online mediums are not eligible to apply.
Candidates planning to pursue postgraduate and undergraduate studies in India are not eligible to apply.
Candidates who are planning to study for a diploma of at least one year duration, whose entry-level requirement is higher secondary level, are not eligible to apply.
benefits: Loan scholarship of upto INR  10 lakhs
documents: Candidate’s photo (500*500 pixels in jpeg format)
Work experience certificate from the previous employer (applicable for working professionals)
Appointment letter from the existing employer (applicable for working professionals)
Latest filed ITR/3 months’ pay slips (applicable for working professionals)
How_to_apply: Step 1: Register as a new user.
Step 2: Complete the application form with required details.
Step 3: Upload scanned copies of necessary documents.
Step 4: Submit the application and note the application number.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST, SC and MBC Students, Odisha 2024-25
reward: Financial assistance for pursuing higher education
eligibility: class 12 passed students of odisha
about: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST, SC and MBC Students, Odisha 2024-25 is an opportunity provided by the ST&SC and MBC Welfare Department of the Government of Odisha to students who are willing to pursue higher education in the specified disciplines. Selected candidates will receive financial assistance to complete their higher education.
Eligible: be a domicile of Odisha
belong to a Scheduled Tribe (ST), Scheduled Caste (SC) or Minorities & Backward Classes (MBC*)
be pursuing their graduation/postgraduation in one of the following disciplines:
Accountancy
Agriculture & Allied Sciences
Animal Husbandry
Applied Art & Craft
Architecture
Ayurvedic
Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA)
Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.)
Bachelor of Science in Engineering (B.Tech.) (consider adding other Engineering specializations here)
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (B.Sc. IT)
Bachelor of Science/Technology (B.Sc./B.Tech.) (consider if this captures other science/technology programs)
Bachelor of Tourism & Hospitality Management
Bachelor in Visual Arts
Bachelor of Vocation (B.Voc.) / Diploma in Vocation (D.Voc.)
Craftsmanship Certificate in Hotel Management
Dental
Diploma in Hotel Management
Doctoral (Ph.D.)
Fashion Design, Fashion Technology
Fishery
Forestry
Homeopathy
Hotel Management, Hotel Management (Postgraduate)
Industrial Training Institute/Industrial Training Centre (ITI/ITC) Courses
Integrated Programs (e.g., Integrated B.Sc., Integrated M.A., etc.)
Interior Design
Journalism
Law
Library Science
Master of Arts (M.A.), Master of Commerce (M.Com.), Master of Education (M.Ed.), Master of Philosophy (M.Phil.), Master of Science (M.Sc.) (include specializations like M.Sc. Tech here)
Management
Master of Computer Application (MCA), Master of Business Administration (MBA) (consider adding other Master's programs here)
Medical
Multimedia and Animation
Nursing
Occupational Therapy
Open Universities (e.g., OSOU) Diploma and Certificate Courses
Paramedical
Performing Arts
Postgraduate Diploma (PG Diploma)
Postgraduate Diploma in Computer Applications (PGDCA)
Pharmacy
Physical Education
Physiotherapy
Polytechnic Diploma
Prosthetics and Orthotics
Public Health
Social Work
Special Education
Teacher Training
Textile Design
Tourism/Travel, Tourism/Travel Management
Vocational Education
have an annual family income of not more than ₹2,50,000
note: Minorities & Backward Classes (MBC) includes Other Backward Classes (OBC) and Socially & Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC) categories.
benefits: The selected candidates will receive financial assistance to pursue their studies.
documents: Copy of passbook of bank account with account number and IFSC code of the bank branch
How_to_apply: Step 1: Click the ‘Apply Now’ button below.
Step 2: Click on the 'Register' button on the right-hand side of the dashboard and fill in the required details to 'Register'. (Note:- If already registered, log in using the registered email ID.)
Step 3: Navigate to the 'Registration' tab at the top of the dashboard and click on it.
Step 4: Tick the check box, and click on the 'I Agree' button to continue.
Step 5: Read the details carefully and enter the required details to register.
Step 6: After successful registration, log in with valid credentials.
Step 7: Provide all necessary details like personal, academic eligibility, and bank information and click on the 'Save' button to draft the information.
Step 8: Click on the 'Next' to save and proceed with the scholarship form.
Step 9: Upload the relevant documents and 'Submit' the application form.

name: KVPY Fellowship 2024
eligibility: Class 11 to 1st-year UG students in Science stream
about: KVPY Fellowship is offered by IISc Bangalore to encourage students to take up research careers in science.
Eligible: Indian citizens pursuing studies in Basic Sciences
Minimum 75% marks in class 10 board exams
note: Fellowship continues till pre-PhD level studies if performance criteria are met.
benefits: INR 5,000 per month for UG students; INR 7,000 per month for PG students.
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official KVPY portal.
Step 2: Register using personal details.
Step 3: Fill in the online application form with personal and academic details.
Step 4: Upload scanned copies of necessary documents.
Step 5: Pay the application fee online and submit the form.
Step 6: Download and print the application confirmation for future reference.

name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY) 2024
reward: Monthly stipend of INR 5,000 and annual contingency grant of INR 20,000
eligibility: Indian nationals enrolled in Class 11 to 1st year of undergraduate programs in Basic Sciences
about: KVPY is a national fellowship program in Basic Sciences, initiated and funded by the Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, to attract exceptionally motivated students to pursue research careers.
Eligible: Students enrolled in XI Standard (Science Subjects) and have secured a minimum of 75% (65% for SC/ST/PWD) marks in aggregate in Mathematics and Science subjects in the X Standard Board Examination.

Students enrolled in XII Standard/ (+2) and aspiring to join undergraduate programs in Basic Sciences (B.Sc./B.S./B.Stat./B.Math./Int. M.Sc./Int. M.S.) for the session 2025-26 provided they have secured a minimum of 75% (65% for SC/ST/PWD) marks in aggregate in Mathematics and Science subjects in the X Standard Board Examination.

Students enrolled in the 1st year of undergraduate programs in Basic Sciences and have secured a minimum of 60% (50% for SC/ST/PWD) marks in aggregate in Science subjects in the XII Standard Board Examination.
note: The fellowship is subject to the candidate securing admission to a recognized institution in the courses as mentioned.
Continuation of fellowship is subject to academic performance and other criteria as specified by the KVPY program.
benefits: Monthly stipend of INR 5,000 during the 1st to 3rd years of B.Sc./B.S./B.Stat./B.Math./Integrated M.Sc./M.S. and INR 7,000 per month during M.Sc./4th to 5th years of Integrated M.Sc./M.S., along with an annual contingency grant.
documents: Proof of enrollment in the current academic program
Mark sheets of the last qualifying examination
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official KVPY website.
Step 2: Register as a new user with a valid email ID and phone number.
Step 3: Fill in the application form with personal and academic details.
Step 4: Upload the required documents in the prescribed format.
Step 5: Pay the application fee online.
Step 6: Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena Scheme 2024
reward: Full fee reimbursement including tuition, special, and examination fees
eligibility: Residents of Andhra Pradesh pursuing ITI, Polytechnic, Degree, B.Tech, MBA, MCA, Pharmacy, and other courses
about: Launched by the Government of Andhra Pradesh, this scheme aims to support students from economically disadvantaged backgrounds by reimbursing their full educational fees.
Eligible: Students must be residents of Andhra Pradesh.
Family income should be less than INR 2.5 lakh per annum.
Beneficiary's family should own less than 10 acres of wet land or 25 acres of dry land or 25 acres of both wet and dry land together.
No family member should be a government employee or pensioner (all sanitary workers are exempted).
Family should not own four-wheeler (Taxi, Auto, Tractors are exempted).
No family member should be an income tax payee.
Students should have 75% attendance to avail the scheme benefits.
note: The reimbursement amount will be credited directly to the mother's bank account of the student every quarter.
Students availing hostel facilities are eligible for additional maintenance charges under the 'Jagananna Vasathi Deevena' scheme.
benefits: Full reimbursement of tuition, special, and examination fees for the entire course duration.
documents: Aadhaar card of the student and parents
Income certificate issued by the competent authority
Bank account details of the mother
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official website of Jnanabhumi.
Step 2: Click on the 'Jagananna Vidya Deevena' scheme link.
Step 3: Download the application form and fill in the required details.
Step 4: Attach the necessary documents.
Step 5: Submit the application form to the respective college or institution's principal for verification.
Step 6: After verification, the application will be forwarded to the relevant authorities for approval.

name: Chevening Scholarship 2025
reward: Covers tuition fees, living expenses, and travel costs to the UK
eligibility: Indian citizens with a minimum of two years' work experience and a bachelor's degree
about: Funded by the UK government, the Chevening Scholarship enables outstanding emerging leaders from India to pursue one-year master's degrees in the UK.
Eligible: Be a citizen of India and return to the country for a minimum of two years after the scholarship.
Have an undergraduate degree that enables entry into a postgraduate program at a UK university.
Have at least two years (equivalent to 2,800 hours) of work experience.
Apply to three different eligible UK university courses and have received an unconditional offer from one of these choices by July 2025.
note: The scholarship covers full tuition fees, monthly stipend, travel costs to and from the UK, an arrival allowance, and visa application fees.
Chevening Scholars must return to India for a minimum of two years after completing their studies in the UK.
Selection is based on academic excellence, leadership potential, and a strong commitment to making a positive impact in India.
benefits: Full financial support for a one-year master’s degree in the UK, including tuition, living expenses, and travel costs.
documents: Work experience proof (at least two years)
Offer letter from a UK university
English language proficiency proof (if required by the university)
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official Chevening Scholarship website.
Step 2: Register and create an account.
Step 3: Complete the online application form with personal, academic, and professional details.
Step 4: Submit required documents, including references and academic transcripts.
Step 5: Apply to three eligible UK universities and secure at least one unconditional offer.
Step 6: Attend an interview if shortlisted.
Step 7: Await the final selection results and prepare for your studies in the UK.

name: Education Future International Scholarship 2025
eligibility: Indian nationals pursuing undergraduate or postgraduate studies abroad
about: The Education Future International Scholarship is designed to support Indian students who wish to study overseas. It offers partial funding to help cover tuition fees for various courses.
Eligible: Indian nationals with a valid Indian passport
Applicants must have a minimum score of 60% in their previous academic qualifications
Demonstrated financial need
Applicants should have secured admission to a recognized university abroad
note: The scholarship amount ranges between INR 2 lakhs to INR 10 lakhs.
It is applicable for courses starting in the upcoming academic year.
Applicants are required to submit proof of admission and financial need.
benefits: Partial funding covering a portion of the tuition fees, ranging from INR 2 lakhs to INR 10 lakhs.
documents: Proof of admission to a recognized university abroad
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official Education Future International Scholarship website.
Step 2: Register by providing your email address and creating a password.
Step 3: Fill out the application form with personal and academic details.
Step 4: Upload the required documents in the specified format.
Step 5: Submit the application before the deadline.
Step 6: Await communication regarding the status of your application.

name: Clermont Fee Waiver Scholarship 2025
eligibility: Open to Indian nationals pursuing master's degrees
about: The Clermont Fee Waiver Scholarship offers partial funding to Indian students aiming to pursue master's programs at Clermont School of Business.
Eligible: Indian nationals with a bachelor's degree from a recognized institution
Minimum academic score as specified by the university
Proficiency in English language
Admission offer from Clermont School of Business
note: The scholarship covers a portion of the tuition fees; the exact amount may vary.
Applicants are encouraged to apply early to increase their chances of receiving the scholarship.
Additional living expenses and other costs are not covered by this scholarship.
benefits: Partial waiver of tuition fees for the duration of the master's program.
documents: Admission offer letter from Clermont School of Business

Step 2: Upon receiving an offer, visit the scholarship section on the university's official website.
Step 3: Download and complete the scholarship application form.
Step 4: Attach the required documents as specified.
Step 5: Submit the application form and documents before the deadline.
Step 6: Await notification regarding the scholarship decision.

name: Neporany Doctoral Fellowship 2025
eligibility: Doctoral students specializing in Ukraine in political science, economics, and related fields
about: The Neporany Doctoral Fellowship provides financial assistance to doctoral students whose research focuses on Ukraine, particularly in political science, economics, and related disciplines.
Eligible: Doctoral candidates at the research and writing stage
Research focus on Ukraine in political science, economics, or related fields
Enrollment in a recognized doctoral program
note: The fellowship amount can vary up to CAD 5,000.
Preference is given to students who have completed their comprehensive examinations and are at the dissertation stage.
Recipients may reapply in subsequent years.
benefits: Financial support up to CAD 5,000 to assist with doctoral research expenses.
documents: Research proposal outlining the scope and significance of the study
Proof of enrollment in a doctoral program
How_to_apply: Step 1: Prepare the required documents, including a detailed research proposal.
Step 2: Visit the official Neporany Doctoral Fellowship website to download the application form.
Step 3: Complete the application form with accurate information.
Step 4: Attach the necessary documents as specified.
Step 5: Submit the application via email or postal mail to the address provided on the website before the deadline.
Step 6: Await confirmation and further instructions regarding the fellowship.

name: Chevening Scholarship 2025
reward: Full tuition fees, monthly stipend, travel costs
eligibility: Indian nationals with a minimum of two years' work experience
about: The Chevening Scholarship is a prestigious UK government program that offers future leaders the opportunity to pursue a one-year master's degree in the UK.
Eligible: Indian citizens residing in India
Bachelor's degree with at least 55% marks
Minimum of two years' work experience
Unconditional offer from a UK university
note: Covers full tuition fees, monthly living allowance, and return airfare to the UK.
Applicants must return to India for a minimum of two years after completing their studies.
Leadership and networking skills are essential criteria for selection.
benefits: Full financial support for a one-year master's degree in the UK, including tuition fees, living expenses, and travel costs.
documents: Unconditional offer letter from a UK university
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official Chevening website and register an account.
Step 2: Complete the online application form with personal and professional details.
Step 3: Upload the required documents, including academic transcripts and reference letters.
Step 4: Submit the application before the deadline.
Step 5: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview at the British Embassy or High Commission.
Step 6: Successful applicants will receive a conditional offer, subject to meeting all requirements.

name: Fulbright-Nehru Master's Fellowships 2025
reward: Tuition fees, living stipend, airfare, health insurance
eligibility: Indian nationals with at least three years' professional experience
about: The Fulbright-Nehru Master's Fellowships are awarded to outstanding Indians to pursue a master's degree program at select U.S. colleges and universities.
Eligible: Indian citizens residing in India
Bachelor's degree with at least 55% marks
Minimum of three years' full-time (paid) professional work experience
Demonstrated leadership qualities and community service
note: The fellowship covers tuition and fees, living expenses, and round-trip airfare.
Applicants should be committed to returning to India and contributing to their community.
Preference is given to candidates who have not had extensive recent U.S. experience.
benefits: Comprehensive financial support for master's studies in the U.S., including tuition, living expenses, and travel.
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the USIEF website and create an account.
Step 2: Complete the online application form with detailed information.
Step 3: Upload the necessary documents, including academic records and recommendations.
Step 4: Submit the application by the specified deadline.
Step 5: Shortlisted candidates will be called for interviews in New Delhi.
Step 6: Final selections will be announced, and awardees will proceed with visa applications.

name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena Scheme 2025
eligibility: Residents of Andhra Pradesh pursuing higher education
about: The Jagananna Vidya Deevena Scheme provides full fee reimbursement to students from economically weaker sections in Andhra Pradesh to promote higher education.
Eligible: Permanent residents of Andhra Pradesh
Enrolled in professional courses like Engineering, Medicine, Polytechnic, etc.
Annual family income below INR 2.5 lakhs
No family member should be a government employee
note: Covers tuition, special, and examination fees.
Funds are directly transferred to the mother's bank account.
Students must maintain a minimum attendance of 75%.
benefits: Full reimbursement of tuition and other mandatory fees for eligible students.
How_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official AP State Scholarship portal.
Step 2: Register using Aadhaar and mobile number.
Step 3: Fill in the application form with personal and academic details.
Step 4: Upload the required documents.
Step 5: Submit the application and note the application ID for future reference.
Step 6: Track the application status through the portal.

name: Bharti Airtel Foundation Scholarship Program 2025

eligibility: Indian students admitted to top 50 NIRF engineering colleges
about: The Bharti Airtel Foundation Scholarship Program aims to support deserving students from diverse socio-economic backgrounds by fully funding their undergraduate engineering education.

Admitted to undergraduate engineering programs in top 50 NIRF colleges
Annual family income below INR 3 lakh
Minimum 80% marks in Class 12 board exams
note: Covers full tuition fees, hostel expenses, and academic support.
Students must maintain a minimum CGPA of 7.5 to continue receiving the scholarship.
Additional mentorship and internship opportunities provided by Bharti Airtel.
benefits: Complete tuition fee coverage, hostel expenses, and mentorship opportunities.

Step 2: Register using a valid email ID and phone number.
Step 3: Fill in the application form with personal, academic, and financial details.
Step 4: Upload scanned copies of necessary documents.
Step 5: Submit the application and wait for further communication.

name: Nikon Scholarship Program 2025
reward: INR 1 lakh for photography and film students
